title: Bare Bones x Fresh Flowers and Plants
description: Bare Bones textures for Fresh Flowers and Plants ! 🌱
body:
![Bare Bones x Fresh Flowers and Plants logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8a41f2d5f45d9815c1816947068125c4381224f8.png)

-----------

This resource pack adds Bare Bones textures to [Fresh Flowers and Plants](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-flowers-and-plants)

You have to place it above the default Fresh Flowers and Plants in the resource pack list

- [Bare Bones x Mods](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones-x-mods) is available !
